name: registry_lookup
description: Looks up the agent_catalog for a given client, matches agent capabilities against the stripped task keywords, and returns a council of agents sized by stakes level (3 for STANDARD, up to 5 for HIGH).

stripped_task.description: Facts-only version of the task to match against agent capabilities

client_id.description: Enterprise client ID to filter agents

stakes_level.description: Determines council size: STANDARD=3, HIGH=up to 5

selected_agents.description: Ordered list of agents selected for the deliberation council

council_size.description: Number of agents on the council
